sections.paragraph:
συμψέλιον, ου, τό (POxy 921; Sb 4292, 4. Written συμψέλλιον throughout Hermas cod. A [s. Joly’s note Hv 3, 1, 4 app.]; so also AcThom 49 [Aa II/2, 165, 19]; σεμψέλλιον: PGrenf II, 111, 37; CWessely, WienerStud 24, 1902, 99f. Lat. loanw. = subsellium. Loanw. in rabb.) bench Hv 3, 1, 4; 7; 3, 2, 4; 3, 10, 1; 5; 3, 13, 3; m 11:1.

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Hermas Hermas , s. H—List 1

Joly Joly = Hermas, Le Pasteur; s. under H—List 1

Hv Hv = Visions

app. app. = appendix, apparatus (when ref. to marginal text-critical information, esp. in N.)

AcThom AcThom = Acts of Thomas—List 5

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

PGrenf II PGrenf II = BGrenfell/AHunt, New Classical Fragments—Lists 4

Lat. Lat. = Latin

loanw. loanw. = loanword

rabb. rabb. = rabbinical (literature etc.)

m m = Mandates

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 961
